__comment: DEMO dashboard — generated by scripts/demo/gen_context_platform_dashboards.py. Uses the built-in TestData datasource so it always renders with Acme-labelled sample data. See panel descriptions for the real Azure Monitor / App Insights queries to swap in.
title: Context Platform — L6 Harness Engineering
description: Layer 6 of the Context Platform (Harness ch.6): operating the agents in production — the gateway pre/postToolUse hooks, A2A v1.0 context, the 21-field llm.call.completed telemetry + token control / FinOps, Purview data-access audit, Sentinel SIEM/SOAR, production-smoke and model routing. This dashboard is wired to the App Insights telemetry seeded by scripts/demo/seed_app_insights_llm_telemetry.py; until then it renders TestData samples — see each panel's description for the KQL to swap in.

panels.title: Harness — operating the agents in production (gateway hooks, telemetry, FinOps, audit)
LLM calls (24h)
panels.description: `llm.call.completed` events in `appi-openhorizons-example`. Real (KQL): `customEvents | where name == 'llm.call.completed' | where timestamp > ago(24h) | count`.

azureLogAnalytics.query: customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | summarize Calls=count()

panels.title: Cost $/day (all agents)
panels.description: Sum of `cost_usd` over 24h. Real (KQL): `customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | summarize sum(todouble(customMeasurements.cost_usd))`.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize Cost_USD=round(sum(cost),2)

panels.title: Token budget consumed (MTD)
panels.description: Month-to-date tokens vs the FinOps budget. Real: token-control counter / budget.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>startofmonth(now()) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize TokensMTD=sum(tin)+sum(tout)+sum(cached)

customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize HitRate = todouble(sum(cached)) / todouble(iff(sum(tin)==0,1,sum(tin)))

customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize Latency_p95_ms = percentile(lat, 95)

panels.title: Hook actions (24h)
panels.description: pre/postToolUse hook interventions: redactions + cost-gate blocks + truncations.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize HookActions=sum(tools)

panels.title: Purview audit events (24h)
panels.description: Data-access audit records from agent tool calls.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize AuditEvents=count()

panels.title: Calls/min by model tier
panels.description: Real (KQL): `customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | summarize count() by bin(timestamp,1m), tostring(customDimensions.model)`.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize Calls=count() by bin(timestamp,5m), model | order by timestamp asc

customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize Prompt=sum(tin), Completion=sum(tout) by bin(timestamp,5m) | order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Cost $/day by agent
panels.description: Per-agent spend — the retirement signal (REQ-AGT-002). Real (KQL): `... | summarize sum(...cost_usd) by tostring(customDimensions.agent_id), bin(timestamp,1d)`.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(7d) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize Cost_USD=round(sum(cost),3) by bin(timestamp,1h), agent | order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Model routing distribution (calls)
panels.description: Routing mix. Real (KQL): `... | summarize count() by tostring(customDimensions.model)`.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize Calls=count() by model | order by Calls desc

customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count))
| summarize p50=percentile(lat,50), p95=percentile(lat,95), p99=percentile(lat,99) by bin(timestamp,5m) | order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Gateway hook actions/h
panels.description: Harness interventions. Real: gateway hook counters.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count))
| summarize HookActions=sum(tools) by bin(timestamp,15m) | order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Purview audit events by classification (24h)
panels.description: Data-access audit by Microsoft Purview sensitivity label.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize AuditEvents=count() by team_=tostring(customDimensions.team_id) | order by AuditEvents desc

panels.title: Top agents — calls / tokens / cost / cache (24h)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count))
| summarize calls=count(), tokens_in=sum(tin), tokens_out=sum(tout), cost_usd=round(sum(cost),2),
            cache_rate=round(todouble(sum(cached))/todouble(iff(sum(tin)==0,1,sum(tin))),3) by agent
| order by calls desc
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | summarize Smokes = iff(count() > 0, 1, 0)

panels.title: Sentinel alerts (24h)
panels.description: SIEM/SOAR alerts. NB: Sentinel module is Phase-2 / operator-gated.

azureLogAnalytics.query: customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome) | where outcome != 'success' | summarize Alerts=count()

panels.title: Model-routing accuracy
panels.description: % of calls routed to the cost-optimal tier for the task.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | extend tier=case(model contains 'mini' or model contains 'haiku', 'cheap', 'workhorse') | summarize CheapTier_pct = round(100.0 * countif(tier=='cheap') / count(), 1)

customEvents | where name=='llm.call.completed' | where timestamp>ago(24h) | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions.feature_id),
         model=tostring(customDimensions.model_name),
         tin=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_input)),
         tout=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_output)),
         cached=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tokens_cached_read)),
         cost=todouble(tostring(customDimensions.cost_usd)),
         lat=toint(tostring(customDimensions.latency_total_ms)),
         outcome=tostring(customDimensions.outcome),
         tools=toint(tostring(customDimensions.tool_calls_count)) | summarize AvgCost = round(avg(cost),4)
